note: Livestream will be available when Jumu'ah is in session. Check back on Fridays at 1:20 PM or follow us on Instagram @rutgersjumuah for updates.
instructions: For Instagram Live: Set 'isLive' to true, add the Instagram Live URL (e.g., https://www.instagram.com/rutgersjumuah/ or the direct live link), and set 'platform' to 'instagram'. Note: Instagram Live cannot be embedded directly, so users will be directed to watch on Instagram.
